learning_batch_audit_v1.operator_learning_status_line_v1: classification=execution_only; decision_windows=51; candidate_search=not_run (parallel replay path — no multi-replay search in this worker); recall_matches=0; bias_applied_fusion=0 signal=0; memory_merged=no; verdict=execution_only — replayed policy on tape; no memory merge, recall match, bias application, or candidate search in this run.

batch_depth_v1.note: total_processed counts one worker result row per scenario submitted to the pool (not inner-bar steps). replay_*_sum aggregates replay depth across successful rows; context_candidate_replays_sum counts control+candidate replays when candidate search ran.

replay_data_audit.note: Full dataset — no calendar-month window slice.

work_units_v1: 1 scenario row(s) · 51 decision windows · 0 candidate-stack replays (control+candidates, if any)
operator_learning_table_summary_v1: Learning Status: EXECUTION ONLY (no tuning engaged)

memory_context_impact_audit_v1.trade_set_baseline_note_v1: Compare this row to a prior batch with the same fingerprint (run_config_fingerprint_sha256_40) and memory_impact_yes_no NO in the scorecard, or use the UI baseline strip after a memory-OFF run.
memory_context_impact_audit_v1.barney_operator_truth_line_v1: No memory bundle merge and no recall bias on this run (deterministic).

training_exam_audit_v1.training_learning_verdict_reason_v1: context_signature_memory_mode=off — Student seam may be inactive by configuration.
troubleshooting_steps_v1: Open the parallel batch JSON for this job_id and read student_loop_directive_09_v1 (seam audit).
If verdict is ENGAGEMENT_WITHOUT_STORE_WRITES: read errors[], soft_fail, memory_promotion_batch_v1, learning_loop_governance_v1.
Compare learning_batch_audit_v1.replay_* sums vs expectation for recipe (harness vs baseline-only).
If Referee trade win % ties baseline but verdict is not PERSISTED_LEARNING_ROWS: do not infer 'no learning' from TW alone.
For exam-pack process (P): use exam fields + l1_p_value_source_v1; data_gap means process compare is blocked.

definitions_v1.engagement: retrieval_matches > 0 and/or LLM succeeded trades and/or harness counters > 0.
definitions_v1.not_referee_tie_breaker: Run TW % vs Sys BL % is a separate Referee rollup; see L1 dictionary.
